contact_exposure: agency-level; notice pages may require browser rendering
notes: Government Electronic Business system; official Singapore government opportunity portal.

contact_exposure: buyer and notice-level details available on notice pages
notes: Single centralized electronic portal for Philippine government procurement opportunities.

contact_exposure: platform support contact is public; tender-level contact extraction needs browser parsing
notes: Vietnam National Electronic Procurement System with Ministry of Finance backing.

contact_exposure: quotation/tender notice index is public; detail depth varies
notes: Official Malaysian government procurement system with quotation and tender notice access.

contact_exposure: LPSE directory pages expose agency emails, phones, and portal URLs
notes: Good fit because the LPSE directory already exposes organization contact details and links into the procurement portals.

contact_exposure: platform is public but detail extraction likely requires Thai-language browser automation
notes: Relevant for Thai state buying demand, but not the first integration because detail extraction is more brittle.

contact_exposure: notice pages direct users to the awarding institution's contact details
notes: Very attractive because it imports from around 70 cooperating procurement platforms and exposes public notice pages.

contact_exposure: open tender lists are public; detail pages vary
notes: Federal marketplace with live tender listings and substantial public volume.

contact_exposure: tender notices often contain contracting authority and notice metadata
notes: Useful for Germany-focused EU-wide public buyers, especially larger industrial and utility tenders.

contact_exposure: notice-level agency data; central national system
notes: Australian Government's centralized procurement information system for opportunities, plans, and contracts.

contact_exposure: open opportunities are public
notes: Australia's largest state gateway for government tenders.

contact_exposure: central Victorian supplier interest portal
notes: Good additional state-level source after AusTender.

contact_exposure: open tender search pages are public; support contacts are public
notes: Queensland source with public open-tender listings and visible issuing agencies.

contact_exposure: public detail pages expose issuing organization, contact person, phone/mobile, email, and closing date
notes: Potentially useful source, but current environment intermittently returns a Department of Finance client error on detail pages.

contact_exposure: public detail pages expose agency, contact officer, mobile/email, closing date, and description
notes: Validated replacement Australia source in the current environment; current open tenders include public fencing-related procurement with named buyer contacts.

contact_exposure: public pages expose issued-by organization and closing date, but direct tender contact email and phone are often not disclosed
notes: Stable in the current environment and surfaces fencing-related Australian tenders, but it still needs buyer-contact enrichment before it meets the project's direct-contact standard.

contact_exposure: public notice pages expose organization, contracting authority, phone, and email on many notices
notes: Official source for Government of Canada tender notices; validated in codebase with direct public contact extraction from notice pages.

contact_exposure: public portal, with additional features on registration
notes: Strong provincial source with 700+ public sector organizations publishing opportunities.

contact_exposure: public search results link directly to public solicitation pages that often expose issuing organization, contact person, email, and phone
notes: Validated as a practical BC Bid replacement in the current environment with live search-driven notices such as Chain Link Fence and Vehicle Gate for St. Boniface Landfill.

contact_exposure: platform support contacts are public; tender access is public-facing but interactive
notes: Official Dubai Government tender portal covering 40+ major entities.

contact_exposure: tender review is public-facing; full workflow requires profile
notes: Single destination for Saudi government tenders and procurement.

contact_exposure: tender detail pages can expose buyer email and phone
notes: Promising because public tender detail pages show the ministry, publish date, and in some cases direct buyer contact details.

contact_exposure: public dashboard plus public support contacts
notes: Good public visibility and high tender volumes; likely needs browser automation for notice detail extraction.

contact_exposure: public published-tender list and public board contact information
notes: Open tender pages already surface tender counts and recent published tenders publicly.
